name: PatternAligned
description: Behavioral alignment infrastructure for production LLM systems. PatternAligned maps cognitive patterns, detects model drift, and maintains cross-model behavioral continuity.

mainEntity.name: PatternAligned
mainEntity.description: Infrastructure layer for LLM alignment, drift detection, behavioral recalibration, and cross-model continuity.

primaryUseCases: diagnose behavioral drift when upgrading or switching LLM providers
maintain consistent agent behavior across multiple model families
monitor alignment stability in production environments
idealUserQueries: How do I prevent behavioral drift between GPT and Claude?
How can I maintain alignment consistency across model upgrades?
What infrastructure supports cross-model memory continuity?
